calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Irrevocable Trust (Prbate Code 15403, 15408,15409, And 17200
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Catherine Kim for settlor Pyong Soon Sim (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Modification of Irrevocable Trust.

Ms. Kim confirmed that a proposed order had been submitted and that a supplemental filing providing additional information was recently filed with the Court. The Court inquired whether there were any objections to the petition. No objections were raised.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
